description: Ranks all Puppet classes active in the given environment by the number of nodes they are applied to, highest first. The inverse of the unused_classes report.

puppetserver_host.description: Hostname or IP of the Puppet Server. Defaults to the target node's certname.

puppetdb_host.description: Hostname or IP of PuppetDB. Defaults to the target node's certname.

environment.description: Puppet environment to analyse. Defaults to 'production'.

stale_days.description: Exclude nodes whose last report is older than this many days. Defaults to 30.

top_n.description: Return only the top N most-used classes. Defaults to 0 (return all).

cert.description: Path to a PEM-encoded client certificate.

key.description: Path to a PEM-encoded client private key.

ca_cert.description: Path to the PEM-encoded CA certificate.
